First and highest-priority clustering column; low cardinality improves performance for departmental filters and GROUP BY operations; nullable in source

MySQL TIMESTAMP stored in UTC maps directly to BigQuery TIMESTAMP (UTC); NOT NULL in source; captures original record creation time

Partition column with DAY granularity enabling partition pruning on incremental loads; second half of the composite merge key (employee_id + updated_date) used by sp_mysqltobq_load.sql; nullable in source — NULL records will be routed to the __NULL__ partition; 60-day retention policy applied at table level should account for this partition boundary
